message:
bench(entropy_scheduler): add Criterion benchmarks for entropy-aware capture scheduling (wa-283h4.8)

8 benchmark groups covering all performance budgets:
- Single byte update (<50ns), 1KB block (<1µs), per-pane entropy (<10µs)
- Scheduling decision 10/50/100 panes (<500µs), sliding window eviction O(1)
- One-shot schedule_interval, feed_bytes throughput, snapshot serialization

All benchmarks pass with results well within budget targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -410,6 +410,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "input_latency_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "entropy_scheduler_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
